title: Dynamic Resource Allocation — Observability of dynamic resources
text:
You can check the status of dynamically allocated resources by using any of the
following methods:
kubelet device metrics
ResourceClaim status
Device health monitoring

The
PodResourcesLister
kubelet gRPC service lets you monitor in-use devices.
The
DynamicResource
message provides information that's specific to dynamic
resource allocation, such as the device name and the claim name. For details,
see
Monitoring device plugin resources
.
